fieldData.name: High-Base Sill

fieldData.name: Beveled Stop

fieldData.name: High Base Sill
fieldData.description: For a more elevated profile, the high base sill is 1.525″ tall and is compatible with all Series 8000 windows. Note that the high base sill does not include a nail fin, offering a streamlined look.

fieldData.name: Standard Sill
fieldData.description: The standard base sill, standing at 0.65″ tall, is designed for use around the perimeter of all Series 8000 windows. It features an equal leg frame with 1″ & 1.375″ backset options of extruded nail fins, providing versatility and ease of installation.

fieldData.name: Sliding Windows
fieldData.description: Available in 2- and 3-lite styles, Fairfield 80 Series Sliding Windows feature a generous glass area that offers a great outdoor view. Distinctive for their smooth horizontal gliding action, sliding windows also feature sashes that lift out for easy cleaning.3

fieldData.description: With simplicity and ease, Fairfield 80 Series Single-Hung Windows will beautify and protect your home. The classic elegance of single-hung windows complements a variety of architectural styles – from contemporary to rustic.

fieldData.name: Sliding Windows
fieldData.description: The generous glass area of sliding windows offers an infusion of natural light and an unobstructed outdoor view. Sleek sashes glide horizontally and lift out for easy cleaning. fieldData.name: Single Hung

fieldData.name: Sliding Windows

fieldData.name: Tempered Glass
fieldData.description: Heat-strengthened tempered glass is four times stronger than regular glass and safely breaks into pebble-like pieces.

fieldData.name: Tinted Glass
fieldData.description:
Tinted glass effectively:
- Reduces solar heat
- Minimizes glare
- Reduces visibility into the home for added privacy.

fieldData.name: Sound Reduction Glass
fieldData.description:
Acoustic glass packages help silence busy streets and noisy neighborhoods.
Assymetrical and laminated glass minimize sound vibrations that pass through the glass, reducing unwanted noise.

fieldData.name: Obscure Glass
fieldData.description: Patterned and obscure glass provides added privacy without blocking desirable sunlight.

fieldData.name: Impact Rated
fieldData.description: Impact-resistant glass combined with products with high design pressure ratings have been tested and approved by the Florida Building Code for high winds and wind-borne debris in coastal areas.

fieldData.name: HP Glass Packages
fieldData.description: For added insulation, High Performance HP glass packages combine Low-E coatings with Argon gas, which is denser than air and sealed inside the insulating glass unit.

fieldData.name: Laminated Glass
fieldData.description:
Featuring a strong PVB interlayer, laminated glass:
- Helps protect against forced entry
- Reduces unwanted noise
- Deflects damaging ultraviolet rays.

fieldData.name: Low-E Glass
fieldData.description: Choose Low-E glass packages with transparent metallic layers to help deflect heat in summer and keep warm air inside during winter for enhanced interior comfort.

fieldData.name: Triple Pane
fieldData.description: For the ultimate in thermal efficiency, available triple-pane glass units create two separate insulating airspaces which helps mainitain a home's interior temperature and lower energy costs.

fieldData.name: ENERGY STAR
fieldData.description: Regionally-specific ENERGY STAR glass packages are designed to deliver optimal energy performance and comfort in any climate.

fieldData.name: HeatLock® Technology
fieldData.description:
HeatLock® coating can be added to most of our glass options and reflects heat that likes to escape your home.
Ideal for: Northern Climates

fieldData.name: Dual-Pane Glass
fieldData.description: Clear dual-pane glass offers basic thermal performance. It's available on select Andersen products in situations where codes allow its use.

fieldData.name: Triple-Pane Glass
fieldData.description:
An extra pane of glass helps keep more heat in and cold air out, making this our most energy-efficient glass option. Perfect for colder climates where more months of the year are spent heating the home.
Ideal for: Northern Climates

fieldData.name: PassiveSun® Glass
fieldData.description:
If you live in a cold climate, PassiveSun® glass allows the sun to heat your home.
Ideal for: Northern Climates
Available on: PassiveSun® glass is available on all Andersen® products.

fieldData.name: Sun Glass
fieldData.description:
Sun glass offers outstanding thermal performance with a subtle tint that blocks out even more heat from the sun.
Ideal for: Southern Climates

fieldData.name: SmartSun™ Glass
fieldData.description:
SmartSun™ glass gives you the benefits of Low-E glass, plus it helps shield your home from the sun’s heat and filters out 95% of harmful UV rays while letting sunlight shine through.
Ideal for: All Climates
Available on: SmartSun™ glass is available on all Andersen® products.

fieldData.name: Low-E / Low-E4® Glass
fieldData.description:
Most people can enjoy optimal energy performance and comfort with Low-E/Low-E4® glass. Low-E glass reflects heat in the summer and helps keep heat inside in the winter, making this a good choice in climates where both heating and cooling costs are a concern.
Ideal for: All Climates
Available on: Low-E glass is available on all Andersen products.

fieldData.name: Finelight Between-the-Glass With Exterior Grilles
fieldData.description: Finelight™ grilles-between-the-glass make interior windows and patio door glass easier to clean. Permanent grilles on the exterior provide architectural style and detail.

fieldData.name: Removable interior grille
fieldData.description: Removable interior wood grilles are secured via a fastener or grille clip and can be removed enabling you to easily clean the glass surface.

fieldData.name: Finelight grilles Between-the-glass
fieldData.description: Finelight™ grilles are suspended between the panes of glass, allowing you to easily clean both the inside and outside of your windows and doors.

fieldData.name: Simulated divided light
fieldData.description: Simulated divided light offers permanent grilles on the exterior and a choice of permanent or removable wood interior grilles, with no spacer between the glass.

fieldData.name: Full divided light
fieldData.description: Give your window an authentic look with grilles that are permanently applied to the interior and exterior of your window with an aluminum spacer between the glass.

fieldData.name: Compact operator handle

fieldData.name: Garden
fieldData.description: Garden windows are a popular choice to brighten kitchens and bathrooms. They open the room to more sunlight and provide a perfect shelf for plants and décor.

fieldData.name: Bay & Bow
fieldData.description: Bay and bow windows make any room feel larger, broaden your view and welcome in more light. Bay windows have three panels and offer a more pronounced, angular projection. Bow windows have four or more panels allowing for a more gentle, rounded appearance. They can be made with any combination of picture, double hung, and casement windows.

fieldData.name: Awning
fieldData.description: Awning windows are hinged on the top and open outward from the bottom with an easy to use crank operation. They allow for ventilation and protection from the rain.

fieldData.name: Casement
fieldData.description: Casement windows offer the unobstructed view of picture windows, but with the benefit of opening for air circulation. They are hinged on the side and swing outward with an easy to use crank operation.

fieldData.name: Double Hung
fieldData.description: Double hung windows consist of two operable sashes. Both sashes can open at the same time for more air circulation and they tilt in for easy cleaning from inside your home. Since double hung windows do not open outward, they are ideal for rooms near shrubs, trees, walkways, and patios.

fieldData.name: Double Slider
fieldData.description: Double slider windows create more air circulation since both sashes open and close by gliding to the left or right. Since double sliders do not open outward, they are ideal for rooms near shrubs, trees, walkways, and patios. To accommodate the double acting sashes, double sliders require a deeper frame than single sliders.

fieldData.name: Geometric
fieldData.description: Geometric windows include window shapes that do not have four 90º corners, such as half-rounds, French arches, trapezoids, and triangles. They can be a bold architectural element that adds natural light and visual interest to your home.

fieldData.name: Picture
fieldData.description: Picture windows offer clear views and welcome in natural light, making any room feel bigger and brighter. Because they do not open, picture windows have no moveable sashes or hardware to obstruct the view.

fieldData.name: Single Hung
fieldData.description: Single hung windows consist of two sashes. The top sash is stationary and the bottom sash slides up to open. The bottom sash also tilts inwards for easy cleaning from inside your home. Since single hung windows do not open outward, they are ideal for rooms near shrubs, trees, walkway, and patios.

fieldData.name: Single Slider
fieldData.description: Single slider windows has one sash that is fixed, while the other sash opens and closes by sliding from side to side. Since single slider windows do not open outward, they are ideal for rooms near shrubs, trees, walkways, and patios.

fieldData.name: Fixed Picture

fieldData.name: Double-Hung
fieldData.description: A popular traditional window, the double-hung features upper and lower sash that slide open vertically and tilt in for easy cleaning.

fieldData.name: Fixed Oval
fieldData.description: A unique oval shape distinguishes this beautiful, non-operational wood window. Built with AuraLast® pine and available with our widest range of customization options.

fieldData.name: Sliding
fieldData.description: Vinyl sliding windows provide easy functionality and a streamlined look. One sash remains stationary and one opens horizontally to the left or right for air circulation. Designed specifically for the Florida market.

fieldData.name: Extended Half Round Fixed
fieldData.description: This non-operating window combines a rounded top with a cornered window bottom. Built with AuraLast® pine, with extensive options for colors, finishes, grilles and glass.

fieldData.name: Bow
fieldData.description: Add a new dimension to your living space with bow windows, featuring a set of joined vinyl windows that open up a space and increase the view.

fieldData.name: Trapezoid Fixed
fieldData.description: This vinyl trapezoid window, featuring uneven left and right sides joined by a diagonal top, can be used beneath a roof line or doubled to create a triangular design.

fieldData.name: Round Fixed
fieldData.description: Create an intriguing look with a round or full-circle stationary vinyl window.

fieldData.name: Rectangle Fixed
fieldData.description: Built from AuraLast® Wood (Pine) - The Wood That Does Not Rot. Other species include Alder and Douglas Fir. Other options include 22 clad colors, grilles, and ENERGY STAR® certification.

fieldData.name: Radius Top Double-Hung
fieldData.description: Enjoy fresh air with an upper and lower sash that slide vertically past each other in a single frame. A concealed jamb liner provides a clean and architecturally focused look. Both sash tilt in for convenient cleaning.

fieldData.name: Half Round Fixed
fieldData.description: A stationary window in the shape of a half-circle. Built with AuraLast® pine and available with multiple options for color, finish, glass and more.

fieldData.name: Bay
fieldData.description: This bay window features a central fixed window flanked by operational windows on either side that provide ventilation. Built with AuraLast® pine and available with multiple options for color, finish, glass and more.

fieldData.name: Awning
fieldData.description: An awning window is appropriate for many architectural styles, and it looks intriguing when grouped with other window types. It is hinged at the top and opens out from the bottom in an outward swing.

fieldData.name: Picture Fixed
fieldData.description: Every fixed, radius and geometric window is unique. These windows are direct or sash glazed and come in a wide array of beautiful shapes, such as half-round, quarter-round, full-round segment arch and elliptical.

fieldData.name: Casement
fieldData.description: A casement window perfectly complements the simplicity of modern design, while also providing maximum ventilation. This type of window is hinged on either side, so the sash opens outward, to the right or left, in a swinging motion.

fieldData.name: Double-Hung Sash Pack
fieldData.description: The double-hung sash pack includes two sash, finishing jamb liners and all other pieces needed to replace a window using the existing frame. Built with AuraLast® pine, with extensive options for colors, finishes, grilles and glass.

fieldData.name: Double-Hung Pocket
fieldData.description: Our signature double-hung window, featuring concealed jamb liners that provide a uniform look, with a pocket frame that makes installation quick and easy. Built with AuraLast® pine, with extensive options for colors, finishes, grilles and glass.

fieldData.name: Casement Pocket
fieldData.description: A classic casement window with a pocket frame that makes installation quick and easy. A recessed sash heightens detail and adds energy efficiency. Built with AuraLast® pine, with extensive options for colors, finishes, grilles and glass.

fieldData.name: Casement Radius Top
fieldData.description: A classic casement wood window with a fully-curved top. Built with AuraLast® pine and available with our widest range of customization options.

fieldData.name: Fixed Long Octagon
fieldData.description: Longer left and right sides give this non-operating octagonal custom window a portrait-like look. Built with AuraLast® pine and available with our widest range of customization options.

fieldData.name: Fixed Half Round
fieldData.description: A half-circle custom wood window that does not open, available in a number of sizes. Built with AuraLast® pine and available with our widest range of customization options.

fieldData.name: Bow
fieldData.description: A row of wood windows, often four or five, with gentle angles that create the illusion of a curved wall. Built with AuraLast® pine and available with our widest range of customization options.

fieldData.name: Casement
fieldData.description: Simplicity of design is always on display with a vinyl casement window. This operating window provides maximum ventilation and allows the sash to be opened outward to the left or right.

fieldData.name: Casement
fieldData.description: The Siteline® casement features a recessed sash for heightened detail and energy efficiency. Built with AuraLast® pine, with extensive options for colors, finishes, grilles and glass.

fieldData.name: Awning
fieldData.description: Hinged at the top, the awning window swings out from the bottom to open. Select from a wide range of size, glass and grilles-between-the-glass options.

fieldData.name: Casement
fieldData.description: Hinged at the side, the casement window swings outward to open for full ventilation. Select from a wide range of size, glass and grilles-between-the-glass options.

fieldData.name: Fixed Picture
fieldData.description: Designed to maximize scenic views, picture windows do not open. Select from a wide range of sizes and glass options.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Bay Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Bay window is a group of connected windows extending outward from a room at desired angles, allowing light and views from multiple directions. Some feature a larger operating or stationary window flanked by smaller windows.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Corner Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Corner window makes the most of panoramic views, creating a design focal point from both interior and exterior perspectives by maximizing views and capturing light from multiple directions with minimal visual disruption.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Corner Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Corner Narrow Frame window makes a streamlined architectural statement in expansive sizes, combining narrow profiles and clean lines with industry-leading performance.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Wood Single Hung Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Wood Single Hung window is a classic style with an operating bottom sash and stationary top sash. Flexible design options like wood species and stains assist with historical accuracy.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Bow Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Bow window is a series of windows connected to form a gentle outward curve. Typically made up of four or more windows, bow windows can create a small nook, bring in more light, and boost visual appeal from inside and out.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Single Hung G2 Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Single Hung G2 window features a stationary top sash and an operable bottom sash. This single hung style is often preferred in a cottage-style window with a small top sash that doesn't need to open.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Double Hung G2 Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Double Hung G2 window blends traditional beauty with state-of-the art window performance. Customize your design with round top styles or single hung operation with optional bottom rail locking mechanism for easy operation.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Awning Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Signature Ultimate Awning Narrow Frame window is a sleek and versatile top-hinged window with a flush exterior profile and narrow frame.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Awning Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Awning window brings fresh air into hard-to-reach areas like over a sink or counter to provide strategically placed light and gentle airflow. It’s a top-hinged alternative or complement to a casement window.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Awning Push Out Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Awning Push Out window opens easily and provides fresh air even during wet weather, with operating hardware at the bottom for easy access in hard-to-reach places. Can be used on its own or as a complement to a casement window.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Awning Push Out Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Awning Push Out Narrow Frame window is hinged at the top to allow fresh air even during wet weather. Thanks to a flush exterior profile and narrow frame, it can be installed without removing the existing window frame. Can be used on its own or as a complement to a casement window.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Casement Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Casement window is offered in some of the largest sizes in the industry, with a secure multi-point lock, durable hardware that ensures smooth operation, and Marvin's exclusive wash mode for easy cleaning even on upper floors.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Casement Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Casement Narrow Frame window is offered in some of the largest sizes in the industry, with a secure multi-point lock, durable hardware that ensures smooth operation, and Marvin's exclusive wash mode for easy cleaning even on upper floors.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Casement Push Out Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Casement Push Out window is a beautiful alternative to crank-out-style casement and awning windows. Get a classic look with smooth push-out operation and Marvin’s exclusive wash mode for convenient cleaning.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Casement Push Out Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Casement Push Out Narrow Frame window opens easily with push-out operation. For new construction or remodeling projects, this window’s sleek design and square profiles create slim lines and an emphasis on expansive views.

fieldData.name: Ultimate French Casement Push Out Window
fieldData.description: The French Casement Push Out window pushes open from the center like a French door and secures the window at multiple, pre-set opening angles to prevent it from blowing wide open even on the windiest day.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Double Hung Insert G2 Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Double Hung Insert G2 window fits into your existing window opening without disrupting interior and exterior trim. Customize your design with single hung operation with optional bottom rail locking mechanism for easy operation.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Picture Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Picture window offers a classic style in a non-operable window, bringing natural light into a room or highlighting an unobstructed outdoor view. Direct glaze glass meets the frame directly without a sash for a simple, clean profile with more glass area.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Picture Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Picture Narrow Frame window offers a classic style in a non-operable window, bringing expansive views and natural light into a room. Its narrow frame allows for replacement without disturbing existing interior or exterior trim.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Wood Double Hung Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Wood Double Hung window is ideal for historic projects where a wood exterior is needed to match original architectural details. Offers flexible design options like single hung or stationary sash configurations.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Venting Picture Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Venting Picture window, exclusive to Marvin, is engineered to provide the look and security of a stationary picture window with the unexpected benefit of air flow through a patented, hidden screen system.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Wood Double Hung Magnum Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Wood Double Hung Magnum window is designed for use in residential, commercial, and historic projects where expansive sizes and the natural look of a wood exterior is needed.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Glider Window
fieldData.description: The Ultimate Glider window offers a streamlined, space-saving design along with Marvin’s exclusive automatic lock system. Choose from two or three panels.

fieldData.name: Ultimate Specialty Shape Window
fieldData.description: Ultimate Specialty Shape windows are available in hundreds of geometric shapes, customized to add special flair to a window design. Many are available as operating windows, providing access to fresh air in addition to unique aesthetics.

fieldData.name: Elevate Casement Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Casement window is a side-hinged option built for smooth operation with a concealed multi-point locking system. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Casement Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Casement Narrow Frame window features a concealed multi-point locking system that securely locks with one lever action. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Bay Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Bay window is a group of three connected windows that extend out at an angle, allowing panoramic light and views. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Bow Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Bow is a series of windows connected to form a gentle outward curve and can boost visual appeal from inside and out. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Double Hung Insert Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Double Hung Insert window offers traditional style with superior strength. Tilt the sashes in or remove for easy cleaning. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Picture Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Picture/Direct Glaze window is a stationary option available in two types to meet various design needs. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Awning Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Awning window brings fresh air into hard-to-reach areas like over a sink or counter. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Awning Narrow Frame Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate Awning Narrow Frame window brings fresh air into hard-to-reach areas, like over a sink or counter. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Double Hung Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Double Hung window offers traditional style with superior strength. Tilt the sashes in or remove for easy cleaning. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Elevate Round Top Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Round Top window offers visual versatility and can complement other windows in the collection. Clean lines and warm wood interiors match various styles, and a low-maintenance extruded aluminum exterior can handle the elements.

fieldData.name: Elevate Specialty Shape Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Specialty Shape windows offer flexible options to fit even the most unusual designs. Use specialty shape windows as sidelights and transoms or combine them to create a wall of fixed windows.

fieldData.name: Elevate Glider Window
fieldData.description: The Elevate® Glider window offers a space-saving alternative when a swinging sash won’t fit. Style meets durability with a low-maintenance Ultrex® fiberglass exterior and warm wood interior.

fieldData.name: Modern Corner Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Corner window features pure modern design aesthetics, is available in custom sizes, and can be used on its own or as part of the Modern modular design system to deliver consistent profiles and expansive glass.

fieldData.name: Modern Awning Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Awning window features pure modern design aesthetics, is available in custom sizes, and can be used on its own or as part of the Modern modular design system to deliver consistent profiles and expansive glass.

fieldData.name: Modern Awning Push Out Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Awning Push Out window features a discreet, nested handle at the sash and frame. It is available in custom sizes and can be used on its own or as part of the Modern modular design system to deliver consistent profiles and expansive glass.

fieldData.name: Modern Casement Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Casement window features pure modern design aesthetics. It opens and closes with a rotating handle and is available in custom sizes. It can be used on its own or as part of the Modern modular design system to deliver consistent profiles and expansive glass.

fieldData.name: Modern Casement Push Out Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Casement Push Out window features a discreet, nested handle at the sash and frame. It is available in custom sizes and can be used on its own or as part of the Modern modular design system to deliver consistent profiles and expansive glass.

fieldData.name: Modern Direct Glaze Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Direct Glaze window features pure modern design aesthetics, is available in custom sizes, and can be used on its own or as part of the Modern modular design system to deliver consistent profiles and expansive glass.

fieldData.name: Modern Automated Awning Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Automated Awning window brings versatility and maximum control over air, light, and views. A low-profile motor and discreet controls keep the look clean and elegant, while quiet operation ensures minimal disruption with maximum performance.

fieldData.name: Modern Automated Casement Window
fieldData.description: The Modern Automated Casement window offers a seamless design experience that captures the spirit of true modern design. These windows can be installed on their own or as complements to direct glaze or awning windows for design versatility.

fieldData.name: Essential Picture Window
fieldData.description: The Essential® Awning window, made of Ultrex® fiberglass, is the perfect low-maintenance solution for increasing your home’s ventilation. Streamlined features and design options can be tailored to reflect home architecture and character.

fieldData.name: Essential Awning Window
fieldData.description: The Essential® Awning window, made of Ultrex® fiberglass, is the perfect low-maintenance solution for increasing your home’s ventilation. Streamlined features and design options can be tailored to reflect home architecture and character.

fieldData.name: Essential Casement Window
fieldData.description: The Essential® Casement window, made of Ultrex® fiberglass, is a side-hinged option built for smooth operation with a concealed multi-point locking system. It offers large sizing for ample daylight, clean sightlines, and design options.

fieldData.name: Essential Double Hung Window
fieldData.description: The Essential® Double Hung window, made of Ultrex® fiberglass, offers a classic look with simplified design. Top and bottom sash tilt and remove for easy cleaning and streamlined options offer the right level of customization.

fieldData.name: Essential Round Top Window
fieldData.description: Essential® Round Top windows are available in quarter-round, half-round, and elliptical styles, offering design flexibility in low-maintenance fiberglass.

fieldData.name: Essential Single Hung Window
fieldData.description: The Essential® Single Hung window, made of Ultrex® fiberglass, mimics the classic, simple design of the Essential Double Hung, but with a fixed top sash that doesn’t open. Streamlined options offer just the right level of customization.

fieldData.name: Essential Glider Window
fieldData.description: The Essential® Glider window, made of Ultrex® fiberglass, offers a space-saving alternative when a swinging sash is not practical. Optimized for smooth horizontal movement with operable panels that tilt inward for easy cleaning.

fieldData.name: Essential Specialty Shape Window
fieldData.description: The Essential® Specialty Shape windows, made of Ultrex® fiberglass, offer eight unique shape options. Specialty shape windows are often used as sidelights and transoms, or combined to create a wall of fixed windows.

fieldData.name: Vivid Awning Window
fieldData.description: Marvin Vivid™ Awning windows have a single sash hinged at the top of the frame. The sash swings out from the bottom, using a manual handle. Position them high on the wall as privacy windows or in concert with matching windows as complementary sources of light and fresh air.

fieldData.name: Vivid Casement Window
fieldData.description: The Marvin Vivid™ Casement window, featuring Ultrex® fiberglass exteriors and reinforced fiberglass composite interiors, is a side-hinged, crank-out window built for smooth operation, clean sightlines, and dramatic maximum sizes.

fieldData.name: Vivid Direct Glaze Window
fieldData.description: Marvin Vivid™ Direct Glaze windows are a perfect way to frame your scenic outdoor views. These non-opening windows are designed for maximum light and visual impact and can make all the difference in a room.

fieldData.name: Push-out operator
fieldData.description: The hardware color will complement the frame color selection.

fieldData.name: Spring action lock
fieldData.description: The hardware color will complement the frame color selection.

fieldData.name: Milgard V450 Radius
fieldData.description: V450 HomeMaker Series radius windows offer circular and arched shaped window styles to enhance the look of your home. Features direct-set glass into the frame to maximize the daylight opening. Includes baffled and offset weep system.

fieldData.name: Milgard V450 Picture
fieldData.description: V450 HomeMaker Series picture windows are fixed, allowing for unobstructed views. These windows feature direct-set glass into the frame to maximize the daylight opening. Includes baffled and offset weep system.

fieldData.name: Milgard V450 Awning
fieldData.description: V450 HomeMaker Series awning windows feature exterior perimeter weatherstripping for enhanced thermal performance. These windows also include dual-foam compression bulb seals for protection against wind, rain, dust and noise.

fieldData.name: Milgard V450 Casement
fieldData.description: V450 HomeMaker Series casement windows include dual-foam compression bulb seals for protection against wind, rain, dust and noise. This window also features exterior perimeter weatherstripping for enhanced thermal performance.

fieldData.name: Milgard V450 Single Hung
fieldData.description: With V450 HomeMaker Series single-hung windows, the bottom sash pulls upward to open, allowing for ventilation. The interlock at the fixed meeting rail helps reduce air infiltration. Includes a bulb seal for protection against wind, rain, dust and noise.

fieldData.name: Miilgard V450 Horizontal Slider
fieldData.description: V450 HomeMaker Series horizontal sliding windows offer the ideal combination of performance and ease of use. The interlock at the fixed meeting rail helps reduce air infiltration. Includes dual-contoured pull rails, heavy-duty tandem rollers, and dual-fin weatherstripping.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Radius
fieldData.description: V400 Tuscany Series radius windows are arched or rounded at the top, bringing softness to the hard corners of a room. This window style can also include full circles, half circles or arch shapes. Choose from operable or picture window possibilities.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Bay & Bow
fieldData.description: V400 Tuscany Series bay and bow windows feature classic styling. Bay windows are three or more windows of varying widths that angle out from the wall. Bow windows are four or more equal size panels that form a curved shape. Combine them with V400 casements or single-hung windows for increased daylight or ventilation.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Picture
fieldData.description: V400 Tuscany Series picture windows are stationary and do not open, helping you enjoy an unobstructed view. They can be used in combination with operable windows so you can take advantage of increased ventilation along with increasing daylight into your home.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Awning
fieldData.description: V400 Tuscany Series awning windows open outward from the bottom for improved air flow. Commonly used in hard to reach areas, they can be easily opened and closed with the turn of a handle. V400 awning windows look great when paired with picture windows.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Casement
fieldData.description: Our V400 Tuscany Series casement windows open like a door, being hinged on one side. They swing out wide for maximum ventilation. The low profile, folding nesting handle tucks away for a clean sight line. They open easily by turning the handle, making them a great choice over a kitchen sink.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Double Hung
fieldData.description: V400 Tuscany Series double-hung windows are a popular style because both the top and bottom sash operate. They don’t protrude from the home, making them ideal for rooms facing walkways or patios. Because they can tilt inward, they are also very easy to clean.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Single Hung
fieldData.description: A popular and classic window style, with V400 Tuscany Series single-hung windows the bottom sash moves up and down to let air flow into the room. The windows open and close easily with the SmartTouch® window lock.

fieldData.name: Milgard V400 Horizontal Slider
fieldData.description: V400 Tuscany Series horizontal sliding windows open and close easily without protruding into exterior walkways. The innovative SmartTouch® window lock makes it easy to unlock and open your window with a single motion. Plus, you can see at a glance when your window is locked.

fieldData.name: Milgard V300 Awning
fieldData.description: V300 Trinsic Series awning windows are the perfect solution for hard to reach areas of your home. The window opens outward from the bottom for ventilation. They open and close with the turn of a handle. Consider pairing them below V300 picture windows.

fieldData.name: Milgard V300 Casement
fieldData.description: V300 Trinsic Series casement windows can provide ample ventilation in any room. The crank handle folds and nests when not in use for a clean look. This operating style works well on upper floors, or those with no exterior spaces without walkways.

fieldData.name: Milgard V300 Single Hung
fieldData.description: V300 Trinsic Series single-hung windows open and close easily in an up and down motion with the redesigned SmartTouch® window lock and handle that is unique to this modern window series. The new hardware practically disappears from view when closed, keeping the contemporary feel of the series intact.

fieldData.name: Milgard V300 Horizontal Slider
fieldData.description: V300 Trinsic Series horizontal sliding windows open and close easily without protruding into exterior walkways. The SmartTouch® window lock, specially redesigned for V300, offers a new modern look with a squared-off profile that blends into the frame. SmartTouch makes it easy to unlock and open your window with a single motion.

fieldData.name: Milgard V300 Radius
fieldData.description: V300 Trinsic Series radius windows have a rounded top, which can break up the hard edges of a room and even add whimsy. Consider this window style for full circles, half circles or arch shapes. Radius windows can be operable or inoperable to suit your exact needs.

fieldData.name: Milgard V300 Picture
fieldData.description: V300 Trinsic Series picture windows let you maximize your view without obstructions. They do not open, so consider pairing them with operable windows to enjoy both daylight and ventilation in your home.

fieldData.name: Milgard V250 Awning
fieldData.description: V250 Style Line Series awning windows open outward from the bottom allowing air to flow into the home. They are a great solution for hard to reach areas.

fieldData.name: Milgard V250 Casement
fieldData.description: V250 Style Line Series casement windows help you enjoy a beautiful view because the window has no rail to obstruct your view. They are hinged on the side and swing open, wide. This provides great ventilation for your home.

fieldData.name: Milgard V250 Single Hung
fieldData.description: With V250 Style Line Series single-hung windows, the bottom sash moves up to allow air to flow into the home. Because the window opens vertically, it makes a great solution for windows that overlook patios, balconies or walkways because it won’t protrude into the exterior space.

fieldData.name: Milgard V250 Horizontal Slider
fieldData.description: V250 Style Line Series horizontal sliding windows open with the sash sliding to the left or right. If your window faces a walking path or patio, consider a horizontal slider that does not open outward into the exterior space.

fieldData.name: Milgard V250 Radius
fieldData.description: V250 Style Line Series radius windows offer a variety of styles that include arch topped, circles, or half circles. The rounded corners help soften the rectangular edges of other windows and architecture in your home. V250 radius windows can be operable or non-operable windows.

fieldData.name: Milgard V250 Picture
fieldData.description: V250 Style Line Series picture windows beautifully frame your view. Because they do not open, they are ideal when paired with casements or awnings, which will add airflow in addition to natural daylight.

fieldData.name: Milgard A250 Awning
fieldData.description: A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum awning windows are durable with clean lines and a modern look. This window opens outward from the bottom to ventilate your home.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Sliding Glass
fieldData.description: C650 Ultra Series French-style sliding patio doors give your home a touch of elegance. On a French-style door, the lower rail is taller than the top and sides, which is aesthetically pleasing to the eye. Sidelites can be added to any operating style.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Radius
fieldData.description: C650 Ultra Series radius windows come in operable or inoperable styles. What sets them apart is the curved feature, which can be a simple arched top or even a circular window shape. A beautiful and elegant option, radius windows can also have grids added. The aluminum and wood frame of the C650 Ultra Series radius windows is designed to blend seamlessly with the operating styles made with fiberglass.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Bay & Bow
fieldData.description: C650 Ultra Series bay and bow windows bring architectural beauty to any home. Bay windows are three-segment units that expand your space to the outdoors. Bow windows are four or more equal-width panels that create a dramatic, curved space in your home. Add operating styles for airflow in addition to daylight.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Picture
fieldData.description: C650 Ultra Series picture windows are the best way to frame a beautiful view. These inoperable fiberglass windows let in natural light and can be used in combination with operable fiberglass windows if airflow is desired in a particular room.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Awning
fieldData.description: C650 Ultra Series fiberglass awning windows open outward from the bottom allowing for excellent airflow. Awning windows come with a folding nesting operating handle.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Casement
fieldData.description: C650 Ultra Series casement windows allow for maximum ventilation in your home coupled with an unobstructed view. They hinge on the side and open just like a door. This fiberglass window style comes with a folding nesting handle set.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Single Hung
fieldData.description: C650 Ultra Series single-hung windows offer superior venting and daylight. The bottom sash is operable and opens by moving upward. Pulling downward closes and locks the window. Ultra Series fiberglass single hung windows have two choices for hardware: a Positive Action Lock™ or cam lock.

fieldData.name: Milgard C650 Horizontal Sliding
fieldData.description: With C650 Ultra Series horizontal sliding, choose from a left or right-side operable sash to allow airflow into any room. Ideal for windows facing a balcony or patio because they do not protrude toward the exterior of the home. Great for replacement window and new construction jobs.

fieldData.name: Milgard A250 Horizontal Slider
fieldData.description: Horizontal sliding windows are one of the most common aluminum window styles seen in homes today. With A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum, you can select which side opens, either left or right. The spring action lock lets you easily see if your window is closed and locked.

fieldData.name: Milgard A250 Radius
fieldData.description: A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum radius windows feature soft curves that make them very visually appealing. Try a full round, quarter round, half round or arch top. Combine a radius window with casements, pictures, awnings or single-hungs for endless design possibilities.

fieldData.name: Milgard A250 Picture
fieldData.description: Because of their clean, narrow sightlines, A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum picture windows make a beautiful wall of windows when used in combinations. These metal windows do not open, or have any rails to obstruct their view, making them ideal for large walls and high ceilings.

fieldData.name: Milgard A250 Single Hung
fieldData.description: With A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum single-hung windows, the lower panel slides vertically upward when opened and it overlays into the stationary top panel. You can close and lock the window securely, in one motion, with the spring action lock. If the window is closed, it's locked.

fieldData.name: Milgard A250 Casement
fieldData.description: A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum casement windows are built to your exact specifications. Aluminum casement windows can be easily combined with other casements or operating styles for a dramatic effect. Casement windows open to the exterior of the home with a side hinge, similar to a door.

fieldData.name: Upgraded Hardware
fieldData.description: Meridian™ and Mastri™ handle designs (left) available in white, oil rubbed bronze, and black. Decorative upgrade options for Madrona™, Mastri™, and Meridian™ handles include brushed chrome and satin nickel finishes Keyed alike option available for multiple doors on the same order.

fieldData.name: Positive Action™ Lock
fieldData.description: Milgard's Positive Action Lock (PAL) makes it easy to close and lock a window securely in one action, eliminating any guess work. The PAL lock meets California forced entry code, one of the toughest residential forced entry codes in the nation, making these windows both beautiful and secure.
